rater 1.3.2.9000
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • rater workflow

  • Changelog

Get the underlying stanfit object from a rater_fit object.

Source: R/rater_fit_class.R
get_stanfit.Rd

Get the underlying stanfit object from a rater_fit object.

get_stanfit(fit)

Arguments

fit

A rater_fit object.

Value

A stanfit object from rstan.

Examples


# \donttest{
fit <- rater(anesthesia, "dawid_skene", verbose = FALSE)

stan_fit <- get_stanfit(fit)
stan_fit
#> Inference for Stan model: dawid_skene.
#> 4 chains, each with iter=2000; warmup=1000; thin=1; 
#> post-warmup draws per chain=1000, total post-warmup draws=4000.
